channel.title: 🎯 Productivity on Nachiket Namjoshi
channel.description: Recent content in 🎯 Productivity on Nachiket Namjoshi

item.title: Guilt as Tax
item.description: Productivity guilt doesn't go away. I think it's supposed to be there.

item.title: Content That Has a Job
item.description: I couldn't fix content overload by consuming better content. The problem wasn't quality - it was that I'd never asked what the content was supposed to do.
